name: On Holding AG
description: On Holding AG is a Swiss athletic shoe and performance sportswear company that designs, develops, and markets high-performance sports clothing and running shoes. Founded in Zurich, the company is renowned for its innovative CloudTec cushioning technology, which aims to provide a unique running sensation. On distributes its products globally through a network of independent retailers, its own e-commerce platform, and select retail stores. The company focuses on combining advanced engineering with sustainable materials to cater to athletes and active individuals worldwide, maintaining a strong commitment to performance, design, and environmental responsibility in the sports apparel industry.
